title: Set Of 3 Sequin Hat Gonk Plush Gifts Christmas Decorations Gnome Scandinavian Decor For Home Kitchen Farmhouse House Decor
features: Christmas Decor: Set of 3 Scandinavian-style gnome plush with sequin hats, perfect for adding a touch of whimsy to your Christmas decorations. This set includes red, white and silver.
Versatile Design: These gonk plush figures can be used as tree ornaments, tabletop displays, or hung around the home for a cosy, farmhouse aesthetic.
Durable Construction: Crafted from high-quality materials to ensure long-lasting use and enjoyment during the holiday season.
Compact Size: Each gnome measures approximately 18cm tall, making them an ideal size for decorating without taking up too much space.
Gift-Ready: This set of 3 gnome plush comes ready to gift, making it a delightful present for loved ones or a charming addition to your own home decor.
description: Bring a touch of Scandinavian charm to your holiday decor with this set of three sequin hat gonk plush. Crafted with intricate details, these whimsical gnome figures feature vibrant sequins and a traditional pointed hat design. Perfect for adorning your Christmas tree, mantelpiece, or shelves, these ornaments will add a festive and playful touch to your home. Measuring approximately 18 cm in height, they are the ideal size for display. Embrace the cosy and inviting spirit of the season with these delightful christmas gonk ornaments, a delightful addition to any Christmas or winter-themed decor.
